summary: Backend: 22/22 pytest pass (including brute-force lockout after fix). Frontend Playwright (390x844 mobile viewport): login→home, tab navigation, website WebView, employees list+search+chips, industries list (8 seeded) + create flow, employee onboard form open + validation on empty save + industry picker bottom-sheet (9 options), profile screen rendered. Minor issue: on react-native-web, Alert.alert logout confirmation does not fire the destructive button's onPress (known RN-web limitation — only first button is invoked); not blocking on native iOS/Android.

ui_bugs.issue: React-Native-Web Alert.alert with multi-button (Cancel + destructive Logout) does not invoke the Logout onPress on web preview — clicking Sign Out stays on Profile. Works on native (Expo Go/iOS/Android). Consider Platform.OS === 'web' ? window.confirm(...) : Alert.alert(...) for parity.

integration_issues.issue: aanservices.in sets CSP frame-ancestors that blocks embedding in iframe on web preview (console: 'Framing violates Content Security Policy'). On native RN WebView this is not enforced so it will load on the mobile app. Web preview shows blocked frame — expected for web.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated → use boxShadow; props.pointerEvents deprecated → use style.pointerEvents. Cosmetic only.

action_items: (Optional / LOW) Replace Alert.alert logout confirmation with Platform-aware dialog so web preview can also sign out. On native the current flow is correct.
(Optional) Silence deprecation warnings by migrating shadow* → boxShadow and props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents.
critical_code_review_comments: _client_ip() correctly uses X-Forwarded-For first (fix verified: 6th attempt from same XFF returns 429).
check_lockout() now coerces naive MongoDB datetimes to UTC before comparison — verified by passing brute-force test.
All API endpoints consistently exclude _id. UUID string ids used throughout. Pydantic validation present on all POST/PUT payloads.
CORS allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=True is technically invalid per spec but harmless here since app uses Bearer token, not cookies.
seed_data_creation: Test created a handful of UI_TEST_Ind_* industries that were left behind (create-only flow under test). Admin cleanup not automated from Playwright. Backend pytest cleans up its own TEST_* data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully green (22/22). Frontend primary flows verified on 390x844 viewport. Only caveat: logout confirmation is Alert.alert-based and RN-Web does not invoke the destructive button's onPress — verify on native if fixed, or use Platform.OS check. A few UI_TEST_Ind_* industries may linger from Playwright create-flow test; safe to leave or clean manually.
rca_of_issue: Iteration_1 bug: brute-force lockout used request.client.host which in Kubernetes ingress varies across proxy pods, so attempts never accumulated against a single identifier → 429 never triggered. Fix: _client_ip() now reads X-Forwarded-For[0] → X-Real-IP → request.client.host. Additionally, datetimes stored in MongoDB are naive; comparing against timezone-aware datetime.now(tz=utc) raised TypeError — fixed by coercing locked_until to UTC before compare. Verified in iteration_2 with TestAuth::test_brute_force_lockout using a unique non-admin email so the real admin is never locked.
